attributes.title: [HAProxy OTel] Overview
attributes.description: Top-level health across all proxies — error rates, traffic volume, latency summary, session saturation, server availability.

params.markdown:
## [HAProxy OTel] Overview

Top-level health across all HAProxy proxies:
- Request rate and traffic volume
- Error rates (connection, request, response)
- Latency summary (response time, session time)
- Session saturation and capacity headroom
- Backend server availability

query.esql:
TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.requests.total IS NOT NULL
| STATS req_rate = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.total))

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.requests.total IS NOT NULL
| STATS req_rate = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.total))

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.connections.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS conn_rate = AVG(haproxy.connections.rate)

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.connections.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS conn_rate = AVG(haproxy.connections.rate)

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| STATS req_e = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.errors)), resp_e = SUM(RATE(haproxy.responses.errors)), conn_e = SUM(RATE(haproxy.connections.errors))
| EVAL err_rate = COALESCE(req_e, 0) + COALESCE(resp_e, 0) + COALESCE(conn_e, 0)

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| STATS req_e = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.errors)), resp_e = SUM(RATE(haproxy.responses.errors)), conn_e = SUM(RATE(haproxy.connections.errors))
| EVAL err_rate = COALESCE(req_e, 0) + COALESCE(resp_e, 0) + COALESCE(conn_e, 0)

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.responses.average_time IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_rt = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(haproxy.responses.average_time))

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.responses.average_time IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_rt = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(haproxy.responses.average_time))

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.sessions.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS sessions = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(haproxy.sessions.count))

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.sessions.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS sessions = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(haproxy.sessions.count))

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "BACKEND" AND haproxy.active IS NOT NULL
| STATS active = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(haproxy.active))

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "BACKEND" AND haproxy.active IS NOT NULL
| STATS active = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(haproxy.active))

attributes.title: Requests by Status Code Over Time

query.esql:
TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.requests.total IS NOT NULL AND attributes.status_code IS NOT NULL
| STATS requests = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.status_code
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND" AND haproxy.requests.total IS NOT NULL AND attributes.status_code IS NOT NULL
| STATS requests = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.status_code
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| STATS req_err = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.errors)), resp_err = SUM(RATE(haproxy.responses.errors)), conn_err = SUM(RATE(haproxy.connections.errors)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL req_err = COALESCE(req_err, 0)
| EVAL resp_err = COALESCE(resp_err, 0)
| EVAL conn_err = COALESCE(conn_err, 0)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| STATS req_err = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.errors)), resp_err = SUM(RATE(haproxy.responses.errors)), conn_err = SUM(RATE(haproxy.connections.errors)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL req_err = COALESCE(req_err, 0)
| EVAL resp_err = COALESCE(resp_err, 0)
| EVAL conn_err = COALESCE(conn_err, 0)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.sessions.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS sessions = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(haproxy.sessions.count)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.sessions.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS sessions = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(haproxy.sessions.count)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.responses.average_time IS NOT NULL OR haproxy.sessions.average IS NOT NULL
| STATS resp_time = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(haproxy.responses.average_time)), sess_time = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(haproxy.sessions.average)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.responses.average_time IS NOT NULL OR haproxy.sessions.average IS NOT NULL
| STATS resp_time = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(haproxy.responses.average_time)), sess_time = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(haproxy.sessions.average)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND" AND (haproxy.bytes.input IS NOT NULL OR haproxy.bytes.output IS NOT NULL)
| STATS bytes_in = SUM(RATE(haproxy.bytes.input)), bytes_out = SUM(RATE(haproxy.bytes.output)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL bytes_in = COALESCE(bytes_in, 0)
| EVAL bytes_out = COALESCE(bytes_out, 0)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND" AND (haproxy.bytes.input IS NOT NULL OR haproxy.bytes.output IS NOT NULL)
| STATS bytes_in = SUM(RATE(haproxy.bytes.input)), bytes_out = SUM(RATE(haproxy.bytes.output)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL bytes_in = COALESCE(bytes_in, 0)
| EVAL bytes_out = COALESCE(bytes_out, 0)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.requests.total IS NOT NULL
| STATS req_rate = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.total)) BY haproxy.proxy_name, haproxy.service_name
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND" OR haproxy.service_name == "BACKEND"
| SORT req_rate DESC
| LIMIT 20

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.requests.total IS NOT NULL
| STATS req_rate = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.total)) BY haproxy.proxy_name, haproxy.service_name
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "FRONTEND" OR haproxy.service_name == "BACKEND"
| SORT req_rate DESC
| LIMIT 20
